name: Security Guidance
description: PreToolUse hook that warns the agent before edits introduce common security risks (eval/exec injection, dangerouslySetInnerHTML/innerHTML XSS, document.write, pickle deserialization, os.system, child_process.exec, GitHub Actions injection sinks). Each unique (file, rule) warning fires once per session — not on every edit. Disable with ENABLE_SECURITY_REMINDER=0.
author: OpenComputer Contributors (port of Anthropic's security-guidance plugin)
